mapper.select: SELECT * FROM connecting_itinerary ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM connecting_itinerary WHERE first_flight_id = #{firstFlightId} AND second_flight_id = #{secondFlightId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO connecting_itinerary(first_flight_id, second_flight_id, publish_status, created_by) VALUES(#{firstFlightId}, #{secondFlightId}, #{publishStatus}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE connecting_itinerary SET first_flight_id=#{firstFlightId}, second_flight_id=#{secondFlightId} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE connecting_itinerary SET publish_status=#{publishStatus} WHERE id=#{id}
